journeySection.label: Professional Journey
journeySection.heading: From Curiosity to Leadership
journeySection.intro: Every chapter of my career has contributed to who I am today. Beginning with customer service and business operations in Kenya, progressing into regional business development, entrepreneurship, relocating to France on <date>27 September 2022</date>, and continuing into data analytics and business operations—each experience has strengthened my ability to solve problems, lead teams, and create value through technology and business.

hero.title1: Entrepreneur | Business Operations | Data Analytics | AI & Digital Solutions
hero.intro: I transform ideas into practical solutions.
hero.paragraph1: My career has taken me from entrepreneurship and business development in Kenya to operations, retail and data analytics in France.
hero.paragraph2: Today my mission is helping organisations improve operations through technology, business intelligence and continuous learning.

highlights.heading: Professional Highlights
highlights.subheading: An overview of the experiences, skills and values that define my professional journey.

leadership.title: Entrepreneurial Leadership
leadership.description: Founder and leader of a real estate business in Kenya with experience in team leadership, client relations and business growth.

analytics.title: Data Analytics
analytics.description: Transforming data into actionable insights using Power BI, SQL, Excel, Python and modern analytics tools.

digital.title: AI & Digital Solutions
digital.description: Building modern websites, digital platforms and technological solutions that enhance efficiency and user experience.

international.title: International Experience
international.description: Combining entrepreneurial experience from Kenya with professional development in France to create practical and international solutions.

contact.alert: Please complete all fields before sending your message.
contact.label: LET'S STAY CONNECTED
contact.heading: Let's Build Something Together
contact.paragraph1: Thank you for taking the time to explore my journey. This portfolio is a living project that continues to evolve with every new experience, achievement and professional milestone.
contact.paragraph2: Whether you are a recruiter, collaborator, entrepreneur or simply want to connect, I would love to hear from you.
contact.whyTitle: Why I Do What I Do
contact.whyDescription: I believe technology, business and entrepreneurship can create opportunities that change lives. My passion is helping organisations grow through innovation, continuous learning and digital solutions while sharing my own journey.
contact.contactText: I'd love to hear from you! Whether you have a job opportunity, collaboration idea, business enquiry or simply want to say hello, feel free to send me a message.
contact.subject: Subject
